description_long: This is a modern, round nightstand with a two-tiered design, featuring a smooth, circular tabletop and a matching lower shelf. The structure is supported by three evenly spaced vertical supports that connect the top and bottom surfaces, giving it a minimalist and open appearance. The nightstand is finished in a uniform, light beige or taupe color, with no visible hardware, drawers, or decorative elements. The legs are integrated into the vertical supports, extending slightly below the lower shelf for stability. The surfaces appear flat and smooth, suitable for placing small items such as lamps, books, or personal belongings. Its simple, functional design makes it suitable for contemporary urban interiors or as a utility table in public spaces.
description: A round, two-tiered nightstand with smooth surfaces and three vertical supports in a light beige color. Minimalist and functional, with no visible drawers or decorative elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular top and bottom shelves, with three vertical supports evenly spaced.
description_view_1: Side view, nearly identical to the front, highlighting the open space between the two tiers and the uniform supports.
description_view_2: Rear view, mirroring the front, with clear visibility of the round structure and support arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the open, symmetrical design and the absence of drawers or handles.
attribute_leg_design: integrated vertical supports extending below lower shelf
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: beside a bed or against a wall
